problem.label: Why Wollny
problem.title: A misaligned chassis costs you on every kilometre.
problem.subtitle: Just a few millimetres of toe deviation mean faster wear, higher consumption and less grip. We bring every detail back to the point.

cloud.title: Without professional alignment
points: Higher fuel consumption from rolling resistance
Restless steering and pulling to one side
Longer braking distance when it matters

founder.label: The workshop
founder.title: Your tyre specialist in Sehnde since 1987.
founder.body: Since 1987 and now in the second generation, we have been all about wheels. Good service, to us, means high customer satisfaction — that includes competent advice, professional workmanship and support even after the purchase. We are your service partner for everything around wheels.
founder.quote: Well advised means better bought — that is our motto.
founder.name: Wollny Reifenservice GmbH
founder.role: Family business, 2nd generation · Sehnde near Hannover

items.q: Do I need an appointment for a tyre change?
items.a: Yes, please arrange an appointment in advance — by phone on 05138 4520 or via the contact form. This avoids waiting times, especially during the seasonal peak. We are open Mon–Fri 07:00–15:30, closed on Saturdays — appointments outside opening hours by arrangement.

items.q: When does a wheel alignment make sense?
items.a: Whenever your vehicle pulls to one side, the tyres wear unevenly, after work on the chassis or after kerb contact. Our 3D measurement shows to the millimetre whether toe and camber are correct.

items.q: Do you store my seasonal tyres?
items.a: Yes. In our tyre hotel we keep your summer or winter tyres safe and clean. For the next change they are checked and ready to go — you do not have to transport anything.

items.q: Can I get tyres and rims as a complete wheel?
items.a: Of course. We advise you on the right size, mount tyres on steel or alloy rims and hand over fully balanced complete wheels — for private and business customers.

items.q: Do you also look after company vehicles and fleets?
items.a: Yes, we are an experienced partner for business customers. Ask us about fleet conditions, predictable appointments and storage.
You will find us at Borsigring 38 in 31319 Sehnde, just a few minutes from Hannover. We are open Monday to Friday from 07:00 to 15:30, closed on Saturdays.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how Wollny Reifenservice GmbH ("we") processes personal data in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR). This document is a template and should be reviewed by qualified legal counsel before publication.

sections.heading: 1. Controller
sections.body: Wollny Reifenservice GmbH is the controller for the personal data collected via this website. For data protection enquiries, please contact us using the details in the legal notice.

sections.heading: 2. What data we collect
sections.body: We process voluntarily provided contact data (such as name, email, phone number, vehicle details and message) as well as limited technical data (such as anonymised analytics and server logs) required for the operation and security of the website.

sections.heading: 3. Purpose and legal basis
sections.body: We process your data to respond to enquiries and arrange appointments (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR), to operate and improve the website (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — legitimate interest) and on the basis of your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

sections.heading: 4. Retention period
sections.body: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary for the stated purposes or as required by law; thereafter it is securely deleted.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights
sections.body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction and portability of your data, as well as a right to object. You may also lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

sections.heading: 6. Contact
sections.body: To exercise any of these rights, please contact Wollny Reifenservice GmbH using the contact details provided on this website.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.intro: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act).
impressum.responsibleNote: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 (2) MStV.
impressum.disclaimer: The contents of our pages were created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under general law.
